title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.395 - Spc. James Burnett, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Missouri Route 25 in Stoddard County
text:
227.395.  Spc. James Burnett, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Missouri Route 25 in Stoddard County. — The portion of Missouri Route 25 in Stoddard County from the city limits of Advance to one mile south of such city limits shall be designated the "Spc. James Burnett, Jr. Memorial Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid for by private donation.
(L. 2012 H.B. 1807, et al.)
